title: 有馬記念の後に・変わらない強さ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon loses to Narita Brian at the Arima
Kinen. The onlooking crowd wonders if she can
ever outdo the Beast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she refuses to give up. She vows to get
a proper rematch against Narita Brian at the
Arima Kinen next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After talking it over, we decide to set the Osaka
Hai as our next goal, and it's going to be first
place or bust!
